items.title: When I built menugen ~1 year ago, I observed that the hardest part by far was not the cod…
items.title_zh: 当我大约一年前构建 menugen 时，我发现迄今为止最难的部分不是鳕鱼……
items.description: When I built menugen ~1 year ago, I observed that the hardest part by far was not the code itself, it was the plethora of services you have to assemble like IKEA furniture to make it real, the DevOps: services, payments, auth, database, se…
items.description_zh: 当我大约一年前构建 menugen 时，我发现迄今为止最困难的部分不是代码本身，而是您必须像宜家家具一样组装大量服务才能使其成为现实，即 DevOps：服务、支付、身份验证、数据库、服务……

items.title: Maybe the move to remote work actually made this worse for people who don't like working…
items.title_zh: 也许转向远程工作实际上让那些不喜欢工作的人变得更糟......
items.description: Maybe the move to remote work actually made this worse for people who don't like working from home, because working from home is now just assumed to be a viable alternative.
items.description_zh: 对于那些不喜欢在家工作的人来说，转向远程工作实际上可能会让情况变得更糟，因为现在在家工作被认为是一种可行的选择。

items.title: Tech companies pay millions of dollars for their employees and then stick them in open-pl…
items.title_zh: 科技公司为员工支付数百万美元，然后将他们留在开放平台……
items.description: Tech companies pay millions of dollars for their employees and then stick them in open-plan offices that make it nearly impossible to get work done. Best strategy for poaching employees is probably to just offer them an office with a door.
items.description_zh: 科技公司为员工支付数百万美元，然后将他们安置在开放式办公室中，这使得他们几乎不可能完成工作。挖角员工的最佳策略可能就是为他们提供一间带门的办公室。

meta.bio: Philosopher & ethicist trying to make AI be good @AnthropicAI. Personal account. All opinions c…
